commit.message:
ci: daily episode sync workflow at 06:00 UTC

Fetches latest episodes from Mixcloud, commits data/episodes.json
if changed, which triggers the deploy workflow to rebuild the site.
Runs daily at 06:00 UTC; can also be triggered manually.

commit.message:
feat(plan-3): add Phase Index table to architect command output

The plan-3-v2-architect command now generates a quick-reference Phase
Index table at the top of the Phases section, listing phase number,
title, primary domain, objective, and dependencies — so users can scan
all phases at a glance without scrolling through the full document.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ac-pilots): adversarial bypass removed — FAIL on score≥7, 3 retries, synthesis fix, all_approved gates

- engine.py: MAX_ADVERSARIAL_RETRIES 1→2 (3 total attempts)
- engine.py: score≥7 after max retries → NodeStatus.FAILED (no more 'forward progress > perfection' bypass)
- engine.py: score≤6 only → pass with warning (minor issues acceptable)
- executor.py: synthesis expansion — output <80 chars + tools called → force 200-word report
- ac-improvement-cycle.yaml: inception gate always→all_approved
- ac-improvement-cycle.yaml: tdd-sprint gate no_veto→all_approved

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Refactor examples to use environment variables for Azure Blob Storage configuration (#9)

* Refactor examples to use environment variables for Azure Blob Storage configuration

- Updated `basic_agent.py` and `composite_with_memories.py` to build AzureBlobConfig from environment variables.
- Added functions to ensure the existence of the Azure Blob container.
- Removed hardcoded Azure Blob Storage configurations and replaced them with dynamic configurations based on environment variables.
- Enhanced documentation in both example scripts to clarify usage and prerequisites.
- Deleted `pyproject.toml` as it was no longer needed.
- Cleaned up code formatting and improved readability in the backend implementation.
- Added comprehensive unit tests for the AzureBlobBackend to ensure functionality and error handling.

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Dariel Dato-on <80038+oddrationale@users.noreply.github.com>

* Apply suggestions from code review

- Add autofix.ci GitHub Actions workflow for automatic lint/format fixes
- Add PyPI version, Python versions, API docs, and autofix.ci badges to README
- Fix E501 line-too-long errors in example docstrings

commit.message:
build-rootfs: add HOSTNAME variable support

Allows setting the board hostname at image build time via the HOSTNAME
environment variable. Defaults to 'cubieboard4' if not set.

Usage:
  HOSTNAME=myboard WIFI_SSID=MyNet WIFI_PASSWORD=secret sudo scripts/build-rootfs.sh

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: auto-derive SUPABASE_URL from DATABASE_URL + hardcode weather API

- database.js extracts project ref from DATABASE_URL to build SUPABASE_URL
  automatically (user only needs to set SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY)
- weather.controller.js reads WEATHER_API_URL at module load with fallback
  to https://api.open-meteo.com/v1

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: update E-01 audit status to Fixed

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor(api): extract UserProfileService — deduplicate profile queries (E-01)

Create UserProfileService with 6 methods replacing duplicated
SecureServiceRoleWrapper + indb_auth_user_profiles query boilerplate
across 8 route files:

- getFullProfile() — profile/route.ts, billing/overview
- getTrialStatus() — trial-status/route.ts
- getSubscriptionDates() — trial-eligibility, my-subscription
- getBillingInfo() — billing/packages
- getPaddleCustomerId() — customer-portal
- getSubscriptionCheck() — rank-tracking/domains

Net: +231 lines (service) / -245 lines (routes) = 14 lines saved,
but the real win is single-source query logic + consistent audit trail.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: comprehensive responsive fixes across all components

- App: min-h-screen instead of h-screen for mobile viewports
- Header: dropdown scales to viewport width on small screens
- Sidebar: close on backdrop tap, close button on mobile, onClose prop
- SummaryView: hide toggle on mobile when sidebar open (sidebar has close btn)
- SummaryForm: responsive hero text (3xl→5xl→7xl), 2-col grid at sm breakpoint
- Summary/TypingSummary: responsive padding, flex-wrap for action buttons
- SummarizeAgainInput: stacks vertically on mobile, full-width bottom bar
- PickedFile: smaller icon on mobile (w-12→w-16), responsive text size
- InputComponent: responsive textarea padding

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: fuzzytextsummarizer
repository.description: Implementation of a novel text summarization system that combines fuzzy logic and advanced natural language processing (NLP) techniques to generate accurate and contextually relevant summaries. commit.message:
audit: resolve circular dependency detection finding - feature verified working

The audit finding claiming circular_dependencies returns integer 0 was a false positive.
Re-verification confirms the feature is fully functional:
- JSON output correctly shows circular_dependencies: [] (empty array, not integer)
- Data structure matches documentation (array of objects with packages and severity)
- Zero circular dependencies is accurate for this well-designed DAG architecture
- Detection logic properly implemented in internal/analyzer/package.go:225-309
- Initialization correct in cmd/analyze_finalize.go:26

Manual verification of package dependencies confirms clean hierarchy with no cycles:
config/metrics → analyzer/scanner/storage/reporter → generator → api → cmd

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add 8 new tools, native drawing with thickness, Docker support

New tools (35 -> 43):
- draw_ellipse: native ellipse via app.useTool()
- fill_area: flood fill via native paint bucket
- replace_color: replace all occurrences of a color
- flip_sprite: horizontal/vertical canvas flip
- rotate_sprite: 90/180/270 degree rotation
- flatten_layers: merge all layers into one
- merge_down: merge layer with layer below
- outline: add outline around non-transparent pixels

Enhanced tools:
- draw_line: added thickness param (native brush when > 1)
- draw_rect: added thickness param (native brush when > 1)
- draw_circle: added thickness param (native brush when > 1)

Infrastructure:
- Docker support (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, .dockerignore)
- Updated README with new tools, Docker section
- 148 tests passing (was 124)
- Version bumped to 1.1.0

Fix tool call details: prevent double-click toggle conflict

work independently.

commit.message:
Fix git-status URL race: don't overwrite URL on session change

onSessionChange was calling updateAppletUrlParam which triggered
history.replaceState, firing a Navigation API 'replace' event that
overwrote the user's explicitly navigated path. Now onSessionChange
only updates internal state and refreshes — URL stays as navigated.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Feature/router tests (#1)

* test: add users and groups router test suites

- 52 tests for users router (51 passing, 1 todo for balance deadlock)
- 93 tests for groups router (all passing)
- withTestContext helper with Proxy-based $transaction shim and callerAs()
- Groups seeded via API, users via DB (no create user API)
- All tests run in rollback transactions for isolation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* test: remove old broken test files

These tests hardcoded user IDs expecting pre-seeded data that doesn't exist
in CI's fresh database. Replaced by comprehensive test suites in tests/routers/
that properly seed data via API calls and use withTestContext for isolation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* test: update groups test suite for description→title rename

Transaction field was renamed from 'description' to 'title' on main.
Updated all createTransaction, updateTransaction, and direct Prisma
transaction creation calls in the test suite to use the new field name.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: disable type-checked ESLint rules for JS files

The type-checked ESLint configs (recommendedTypeChecked, stylisticTypeChecked)
were applied to all files including .js, but parserOptions with projectService
was only configured for .ts/.tsx files, causing errors on src/env.js.
